subject: Databases
title: CHECK Constraints
description: A quick, practical guide to CHECK Constraints.

hook.text: An order quantity of -3? A price of negative $50? CHECK constraints enforce business rules at the database level.

buildup.text: CHECK (quantity > 0) ensures no negative quantities. CHECK (status IN ('active','paused','cancelled')) limits values.

discovery.text: CHECK constraints run on every INSERT and UPDATE. Invalid data is rejected before it's stored.

twist.text: MySQL historically ignored CHECK constraints silently. Only version 8.0.16+ enforces them. Check your version.

climax.text: Combine CHECK with NOT NULL and UNIQUE for airtight data validation at the schema level.

punchline.text: CHECK: define the rules. The database enforces them.

quiz.question: What risk existed with CHECK constraints in older MySQL versions?
options: MySQL silently accepted the syntax but didn't enforce the constraint
They only worked on text columns
